examples: I like my bacon extra crispy.
These fries are nice and crispy.
context: Just how I remembered. Crispy on the outside, sweet and nutty on the inside. So yummy. I'm going to be on a sugar high after this though. Are you going to eat them both? No. These are mine. Didn't you order one? Gritty. I'll let you have one bite if you're nice. How about that? I have a big one bite.

examples: I'm definitely coming to the party.
This is definitely the best pizza I've ever had.
You should definitely try the cheesecake.
context: So, it's a bit different from what I've had in the past. This place is called Hapchan Iryu, Doiju Gukbap. And the line outside was crazy. I definitely think it's very popular with the locals.

There are tons of vendors. I love the energy. Today, I just took a look around the market, but I'm definitely coming back to enjoy some of the delicious seafood next time. Right now, I'm trying to save my appetite for our next stop. You'll see why. Our next stop is within walking distance. It only takes about five minutes to get there on foot.

examples: This iced tea is so refreshing.
It was refreshing to hear a different opinion.
A refreshing breeze came through the window.
context: Bibim muneung is the best. Yes, exactly. You're catching on. Of course, I need to add just a touch of mustard and vinegar for that extra flavor. So refreshing. I love this. Cold noodles are one of my personal favorite Korean foods. I love all cold noodles. This one tastes like jjormyeon.

examples: I prefer savory food over sweet.
The stew had a rich, savory flavor.
Korean food is known for its savory dishes.
context: Garlicky, rich, savory. This is the perfect comfort food. Let's try a bite with the meats and noodles now.

examples: I bought a souvenir for my mom.
This magnet is a souvenir from Paris.
The gift shop sells all kinds of souvenirs.
context: It's the perfect keepsake. BTS, my grandma would be sad she's not here right now. My grandma is army. It is my bias. I'm army. There are so many cute souvenir shops selling little trinkets here, but I already got my souvenir. Gamcheon is so colorful and charming, but it's time to move on to my next destination. Jaregachi Market is one of the most famous seafood markets in Korea. It's the perfect place for seafood lovers. And since Busan is a coastal city, everything is especially fresh here. I can't believe the size of some of the fish here. They're huge. It's so lively here.
